data.body:
OMG, the “Fairness Doctrine” again. What a great marketing name! 
It did nothing to make broadcast journalism “fair.” It did not promote fact-checking or truth-telling. It didn’t guarantee all points of view were represented meaningfully. It didn’t apply to cable news, newspapers, magazines, etc.
